Remark.doc: represents a REMARK condition (opcode 1) that attaches arbitrary data to a coin spend without affecting consensus.

AggSigParent.doc: represents an AGG_SIG_PARENT condition that requires a BLS signature bound to the parent coin ID.

AggSigPuzzle.doc: represents an AGG_SIG_PUZZLE condition that requires a BLS signature bound to the puzzle hash.

AggSigAmount.doc: represents an AGG_SIG_AMOUNT condition that requires a BLS signature bound to the coin amount.

AggSigPuzzleAmount.doc: represents an AGG_SIG_PUZZLE_AMOUNT condition that requires a BLS signature bound to both puzzle hash and amount.

AggSigParentAmount.doc: represents an AGG_SIG_PARENT_AMOUNT condition that requires a BLS signature bound to both parent ID and amount.

AggSigParentPuzzle.doc: represents an AGG_SIG_PARENT_PUZZLE condition that requires a BLS signature bound to both parent ID and puzzle hash.

AggSigUnsafe.doc: represents an AGG_SIG_UNSAFE condition that requires a BLS signature on the raw message without domain separation.

AggSigMe.doc: represents an AGG_SIG_ME condition that requires a BLS signature bound to the coin ID and genesis challenge.

CreateCoin.doc: represents a CREATE_COIN condition that creates a new coin with the given puzzle hash, amount, and optional memos.

ReserveFee.doc: represents a RESERVE_FEE condition that reserves a minimum transaction fee from this coin's spend.

CreateCoinAnnouncement.doc: represents a CREATE_COIN_ANNOUNCEMENT condition that broadcasts a message from this coin.

CreatePuzzleAnnouncement.doc: represents a CREATE_PUZZLE_ANNOUNCEMENT condition that broadcasts a message from this puzzle hash.

AssertCoinAnnouncement.doc: represents an ASSERT_COIN_ANNOUNCEMENT condition that requires a specific coin announcement to exist.

AssertPuzzleAnnouncement.doc: represents an ASSERT_PUZZLE_ANNOUNCEMENT condition that requires a specific puzzle announcement to exist.

AssertConcurrentSpend.doc: represents an ASSERT_CONCURRENT_SPEND condition that requires another coin to be spent in the same block.

AssertConcurrentPuzzle.doc: represents an ASSERT_CONCURRENT_PUZZLE condition that requires a coin with the given puzzle hash to be spent concurrently.

AssertSecondsRelative.doc: represents an ASSERT_SECONDS_RELATIVE condition that requires a minimum time to have passed since the coin was created.

AssertSecondsAbsolute.doc: represents an ASSERT_SECONDS_ABSOLUTE condition that requires the block timestamp to be at least the given value.

AssertHeightRelative.doc: represents an ASSERT_HEIGHT_RELATIVE condition that requires a minimum number of blocks since the coin was created.

AssertHeightAbsolute.doc: represents an ASSERT_HEIGHT_ABSOLUTE condition that requires the block height to be at least the given value.

AssertBeforeSecondsRelative.doc: represents an ASSERT_BEFORE_SECONDS_RELATIVE condition that requires the spend to occur before a relative time.

AssertBeforeSecondsAbsolute.doc: represents an ASSERT_BEFORE_SECONDS_ABSOLUTE condition that requires the spend to occur before an absolute timestamp.

AssertBeforeHeightRelative.doc: represents an ASSERT_BEFORE_HEIGHT_RELATIVE condition that requires the spend to occur before a relative block height.

AssertBeforeHeightAbsolute.doc: represents an ASSERT_BEFORE_HEIGHT_ABSOLUTE condition that requires the spend to occur before an absolute block height.

AssertMyCoinId.doc: represents an ASSERT_MY_COIN_ID condition that verifies the spending coin's ID matches the expected value.

AssertMyParentId.doc: represents an ASSERT_MY_PARENT_ID condition that verifies the spending coin's parent ID.

AssertMyPuzzleHash.doc: represents an ASSERT_MY_PUZZLEHASH condition that verifies the spending coin's puzzle hash.

AssertMyAmount.doc: represents an ASSERT_MY_AMOUNT condition that verifies the spending coin's amount.

AssertMyBirthSeconds.doc: represents an ASSERT_MY_BIRTH_SECONDS condition that verifies the timestamp when the coin was created.

AssertMyBirthHeight.doc: represents an ASSERT_MY_BIRTH_HEIGHT condition that verifies the block height when the coin was created.

AssertEphemeral.doc: represents an ASSERT_EPHEMERAL condition that requires the coin to be created and spent in the same block.

SendMessage.doc: represents a SEND_MESSAGE condition (CHIP-0025) that sends a cross-coin message with a mode and data.

ReceiveMessage.doc: represents a RECEIVE_MESSAGE condition (CHIP-0025) that receives a cross-coin message with a mode and data.

Softfork.doc: represents a SOFTFORK condition that reserves cost for future consensus rule changes.

MeltSingleton.doc: represents a condition that permanently destroys a singleton by melting it.

TransferNft.doc: represents an NFT transfer condition that changes the DID owner and includes trade prices for royalty calculation.

RunCatTail.doc: represents a RUN_CAT_TAIL condition that executes a CAT's TAIL program to validate supply changes.

UpdateNftMetadata.doc: represents an NFT metadata update condition that runs the metadata updater puzzle with a solution.

UpdateDataStoreMerkleRoot.doc: represents a DataLayer merkle root update condition that sets the new root hash with optional memos.

TradePrice.doc: represents a trade price entry for NFT royalty calculation: the trade amount and the settlement puzzle hash.
